Commission.Description: Platform commission rate (10% of item price)

Shipping.Description: Shipping rules: 15 PLN flat rate per seller, free above 200 PLN

Returns.Description: Buyers can request returns within 14 days after delivery

SLA.Description: SLA tracking: sellers must respond within 48 hours and resolve cases within 168 hours (7 days)

ReputationScoring.Description: Reputation scoring weights and thresholds. Ratings (35%), Disputes (25%), On-time delivery (25%), SLA (15%). Recalculated every 24 hours.

Przelewy24.Description: Przelewy24 payment provider configuration. Set Enabled=true and provide credentials for production.

Payments.Description: Payment provider configuration for online payments

Payouts.Description: Seller payout configuration. Weekly payouts on Fridays, minimum 50 PLN balance required. Dispute window of 14 days after delivery before funds are eligible.

CommissionInvoice.Description: Commission invoice configuration. TaxRate is VAT rate applied to commission (23% for Poland). Platform information is printed on invoices.

WebPush.Description: Web Push notification configuration. Generate VAPID keys using 'npx web-push generate-vapid-keys'. VapidSubject should be a mailto: or https: URL identifying your application.

Analytics.Description: Advanced analytics tracking for Phase 2. TrackAnonymousSessions controls whether anonymous user browsing is tracked. All tracking is privacy-compliant and aggregated for reporting.

Encryption.Description: Encryption configuration (ADR-085). KeyManagementProvider options: 'FileSystem' (dev), 'AzureKeyVault', 'AwsKms'. In production, use AzureKeyVault or AwsKms with managed identities.

AuditLog.Description: Audit log retention policy (ADR-086). CriticalRetentionDays is ~7 years for compliance (financial, security events). StandardRetentionDays is 1 year. Set EnableDeletion=true to permanently delete archived logs.

SecurityIncidents.Description: Security incident alerting configuration (ADR-087). AlertSeverityThreshold: incidents at or above this severity trigger emails. Options: 'Low', 'Medium', 'High', 'Critical'. AlertRecipients: email addresses that receive security incident alerts.

App.Description: Application base URL used for generating links in emails and notifications.
